title: Indulgent Italian Tomato Torta Caprese
description: A fermented, chewy Italian dish featuring tomato ketchup and dashi extract, served in a Korean brass bowl. This low-glycemic-friendly recipe is a twist on the classic torta caprese.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together tomato ketchup, dashi extract, and korean chili flakes.
Add mozzarella cheese to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Stir in fresh basil, extra virgin olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and salt.
Transfer the mixture to a Korean brass bowl.
Bake the torta caprese in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the indulgent Italian tomato torta caprese warm, garnished with additional fresh basil if desired.
